scenario.name: Ask about insurance
scenario.goal: Confirm whether a specific insurance plan is accepted.
end_when: The office confirms acceptance or gives a clear next step.
Avery understands who to contact if needed.
details: Avery has a PPO plan and wants to know if it is accepted.
Avery asks what information is needed to verify coverage.
Avery wants a simple, direct answer.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: of course, this is Debbie Point Orthopedics, am I speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: This is Avery Chen. I'm calling to find out if you accept my insurance plan.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Please provide your date of birth.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, it's March 14, 1990.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks. So can you tell me if you accept my PPO insurance plan?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Pivot Point Orthopedics, accepts most insurance plans, including many PPO options. Would you like to update or check your insurance details on file?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, I'd like to check if my specific PPO plan is accepted. What information do you need from me to verify that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Let me send you a secure link by text so you can check if your PPO plan is accepted and update your insurance details if needed.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: That sounds good. Just to confirm, you do accept PPO plans, right? And if I have any issues, who should I contact?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: You currently do not have any insurance on file with us. Would you like to add your PPO insurance by uploading a photo of your card?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, I can upload a photo. But just to be sure before I do — do you accept my PPO plan? And if I have any other questions after that, who should I contact?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Is that okay?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that works. So just to clarify — you do accept PPO plans, correct? And if I have questions later, who should I contact?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I just sent the

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I saw the link, thanks. So can you confirm that my PPO plan is accepted here, and who I should call if I have follow-up questions?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: If you have any questions about the form, just let me know.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'll go ahead and upload my card. But I still need a simple yes or no — do you accept PPO plans? And who do I contact if I have more questions?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Yes, we accept many PPO plans.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Great, thank you for confirming. And if I have any further questions, who should I contact?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Office directly for any questions or reply to the text message. You received someone from our team will help you.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Got it, thanks. I'll upload my card and reach out if I need anything else.
